title: Python for DevOps (Starter)
description: A free starter introduction to using Python for DevOps automation: a Python refresher, file/system operations, and basic process automation.

modules.title: Python Basics Refresher
modules.description: A fast-paced review of Python fundamentals: data types, control flow, functions, list comprehensions, and virtual environments.
objectives: Review core Python data types and control flow
Write functions with default and keyword arguments
Set up and use a virtual environment

modules.title: File and System Operations
modules.description: Automate file and system tasks using Python's os, pathlib, and subprocess modules.
objectives: Read, write, and manipulate files with pathlib
Run and capture output from shell commands via subprocess

modules.title: Process Automation Basics
modules.description: Build simple automation scripts that orchestrate multi-step tasks and handle failures gracefully.
objectives: Log automation script output for troubleshooting
